# HPD.ML.Clustering.MiniBatchKMeansLearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-Clustering` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Clustering`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Clustering`
- Kind: `class`

Mini-Batch K-Means (Sculley, 2010). Samples a mini-batch per iteration instead of full dataset passes.

```csharp
public sealed class MiniBatchKMeansLearner : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ILearner
```
